plugins.description: Project-level AI coding discipline for Claude Code and Codex. Nine skills that activate at key development moments — requirement evaluation, implementation scoping, post-task review, debug, feature end, periodic audit — consulting project-specific sediment (architectural intent, lessons-log) to keep work aligned.
